overall.description: A cinematic first-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic corporate boardroom from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring warm amber lighting, Japanese-inspired decor with red coral sculptures, a grand marble conference table, and transitioning from a grand hall to an intimate meditation space.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury corporate entrance corridor with red coral sculptures

events.description: exits the narrow entrance corridor into the grand conference hall

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the entrance corridor toward the main conference hall

entered.detail: tall red glowing coral-like sculpture in a dark vase on a pedestal
tall red glowing coral-like sculpture in a dark vase on a pedestal
parallel glowing amber light strips embedded in the dark floor
large industrial ventilation structure on the ceiling
large circular golden wall decoration at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, luxurious corridor flanked by glowing red coral sculptures. The camera moves forward through the entrance, transitioning into a wider grand hall with illuminated floor strips leading toward a large circular gold emblem on the far wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand executive conference hall with central marble table

events.description: camera slows as it approaches the conference table

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand conference table while observing the luxurious interior details

entered.detail: large multi-tiered marble conference table with geometric base
modern leather office chairs positioned around the table
large glass windows showing dark cityscape outside
small bonsai-style plant centerpiece on the table

segments.scene_description: Moving into the wide conference hall, the grand marble table comes into full view with executive chairs arranged around it. The red coral sculptures fall behind as the camera approaches the table centerpiece, with city views visible through distant windows.

events.description: camera begins orbiting around the conference table
moving into slightly darker area near the wooden wall panels

agents.ego_description: circling around the conference table to survey the room from different angles

entered.detail: vertical dark wood paneling covering the right wall
floor-to-ceiling windows revealing nighttime city lights

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around the marble conference table, revealing dark wooden wall panels and city views through the exterior windows. The lighting shifts subtly as the perspective changes, moving from the emblem wall toward the darker sides of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: private meditation area with raised platform and ambient lighting

events.description: entering the darker back room from the main conference hall
significant drop in ambient light, transitioning to intimate wall-sconce lighting

agents.ego_description: moving from the main conference area into the private back room with the raised meditation platform

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with steps for meditation or private meetings
warm amber wall-mounted lights illuminating the dark wood panels
intricate golden decorative elements on the dark wall
traditional-style illuminated paper lantern near the entrance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the main conference table behind, the camera enters a darker, more intimate back room featuring a raised wooden platform for meditation. The lighting shifts to warm wall sconces and a paper lantern, creating a serene atmosphere distinct from the grand hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, opulent corridor into a grand corporate hall that eventually settles into a serene, intimate meditation space. It begins by gliding past glowing red coral sculptures through a luxurious entrance, where illuminated floor strips guide the perspective toward a large circular gold emblem on the far wall. As the camera enters the wide conference hall, the red sculptures recede to reveal a grand marble table and executive chairs set against a backdrop of distant city views. The scene then shifts as the camera orbits the table, moving away from the emblem wall and passing dark wooden panels before turning toward the rear of the room. Finally, the camera leaves the main hall behind to enter a darker back room, where the lighting transitions to warm wall sconces and a paper lantern illuminating a raised wooden meditation platform.
